title: Connector NDJSON envelope
description: One envelope, three event kinds. Connectors POST a stream of these (NDJSON, one JSON object per line) to the runtime sidecar at /v1/findings, /v1/progress, or /v1/log. The sidecar forwards them to AA26's existing data-ingestion pipeline.

kind.description: finding = a structured record (see 'type'); progress = scan-execution progress tick; log = structured log event.

executionId.description: The scan_executions row this event belongs to. Set by the runtime; connectors read it from /v1/invocation.

sourceId.description: The Source the execution is running against.

oneOf.title: Finding event

predicate.description: Relationship between subject and object. Shape depends on finding type. For access_grant: {permission, inherited?, via?}. For sensitive_match: {match, classifier, region?, sample?}. For object_metadata: typically empty.

evidence.description: Opaque per-connector raw evidence; framework doesn't interpret. Indexed for free-text search by ingestion.

labels.description: Arbitrary string→string labels for filtering/grouping in the UI.

oneOf.$comment: subject/object/predicate are kind-specific; for object_metadata only object is meaningful, for sensitive_match only object+predicate.

findingType.description: Three built-ins. custom: prefix for connector-specific types — must be declared in manifest.spec.permissions.findingTypes.

kind.description: principal | group | file | folder | table | view | bucket | mailbox | message | site | row | <connector-defined>

id.description: Stable identifier within the source (e.g. file path, URN, GUID).
